name: sox11a_sox11b_chr6_chr23
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: sox11a/sox11b — TGD ohnolog pair retained for dosage; ~88% CDS identity. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
